ingredients_text: Pulled Chicken (36%) (Chicken (91%),- Water, Maize Starch, Salt, Mineral Salt (500), Tapioca Starch, Canola Oil), Kimchi Style Rice (35%) (Cooked Rice (40%) (Rice, Water), Green Beans, Carrot, Capsicum, Cabbage, Apple Cider Vinegar, Bamboo Shoots (1.5%), Onion, Sesame Oil, Ginger, Lemongrass, Basil, Galangal, Chilli, Pepper, Sugar, Salt), Korean Style Sauce (28%) (Water, Onion, Garlic (6%), Honey, Ginger (5%), Soy Sauce (contains Wheat, Soybeans), Canola Oil, Shao Hsing Wine (contains Wheat), Thickener (1422, from Maize), Miso Paste (contains Soybeans), Sesame Oil, Beef Bouillon Powder, Pepper, Chilli, Fermented Red Rice). ALLERGEN ADVICE: Contains: Gluten, Soybeans, Sesame
